nasb.text: Do not trust in deceptive words, saying, ‘This is the temple of the Lord, the temple of the Lord, the temple of the Lord.’

esv.text: Do not trust in these deceptive words: ‘This is the temple of the Lord, the temple of the Lord, the temple of the Lord.’

cnv.text: 你們不要倚靠虛謊的話，說：‘這是耶和華的殿，是耶和華的殿，是耶和華的殿。’

ccb.text: 你们不要相信那些谎言，说这是耶和华的殿，这是耶和华的殿，这是耶和华的殿。
